features.name: Custom sample prompts
features.scope: Allow New Job drafts to carry a custom sample prompt table and run samples from a generated test JSONL while preserving the selected training dataset.
evidence: New Job UI now includes a Chinese-first sample prompt textarea that accepts one prompt per line and stores non-empty rows in trainingOverrides.samplePrompts.
trainer-ui/src/lib/trainingConfig.ts normalizes sampling.samplePrompts into TrainingOverridesV2 and keeps legacy override compatibility.

trainer-ui/src/lib/jobs.ts writes custom sample prompts to trainer-data/jobs/samples/<expName>.jsonl by copying selected dataset rows and overriding prompt fields, then passes that file as DATA_PATH_TEST_JSONL while keeping DATA_PATH_TRAIN_JSONL on the training dataset.
Targeted red-green tests test_sampling_config_accepts_custom_sample_prompt_table and test_runner_writes_custom_sample_jsonl_for_test_dataset passed after implementation.
